title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in with valid credentials and lands on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Redirect unauthenticated user away from protected dashboard home
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user cannot access the dashboard home and is redirected or blocked.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the user is redirected to the login page or a blocked-access view is shown

title: Create a new athlete and see it in the list
description: Verifies a user can add a new athlete via the form and the athlete appears in the current-session list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to navigate to the athletes section
Start adding a new athlete
Fill Test Athlete A into the athlete name field
Fill valid values into any other required athlete fields
Submit the new athlete form
Verify the new athlete appears in the athletes list

title: Create a coach from the coaches list
description: Verifies a staff user can add a new coach and the coach appears in the coaches list within the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to coaches
Start adding a new coach
Fill a valid coach name into the name field
Fill a valid coach contact value into the contact field
Submit the coach form
Verify the new coach appears in the coaches list

title: Create a support ticket from the tickets page
description: User can create a new support ticket and it appears in the tickets list with an initial status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for tickets
Start creating a new ticket
Fill a unique subject into the ticket subject field
Fill details into the ticket description field
Submit the ticket
Verify the newly created ticket is displayed in the tickets list with a status indicator

title: Navigate from dashboard to athletes via sidebar without losing session
description: Verifies a signed-in user can navigate from the dashboard to Athletes using the sidebar and remains authenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to navigate to the athletes section
Verify the athletes management view is displayed

title: Create a class template from the class templates list
description: Verifies a staff user can create a class template and it appears in the templates list within the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to class templates
Start creating a new class template
Fill Strength 45 into the class name field
Select a valid duration value
Fill a short class description into the description field
Submit the class template form
Verify the new class template appears in the templates list

title: Edit an existing athlete and see updated details in the list
description: Verifies a user can edit an athlete created in the session and the list reflects the updated details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to navigate to the athletes section
Start adding a new athlete
Fill Test Athlete B into the athlete name field
Fill valid values into any other required athlete fields
Submit the new athlete form
Select the athlete named Test Athlete B to edit
Update the athlete name to Test Athlete B Updated
Save the athlete changes
Verify the athletes list shows the updated athlete details

title: Edit an existing coach from the coaches list
description: Verifies a staff user can edit a coach and the updated coach details are shown in the coaches list within the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to coaches
Start adding a new coach
Fill Coach Alpha into the name field
Fill a valid coach contact value into the contact field
Submit the coach form
Select the coach record to edit
Fill Coach Alpha Updated into the name field
Save the coach changes
Verify the coaches list shows the updated coach name

title: Edit an existing class template from the templates list
description: Verifies a staff user can edit a class template and the updated template details are shown in the templates list within the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to class templates
Start creating a new class template
Fill Conditioning 30 into the class name field
Select a valid duration value
Fill a short class description into the description field
Submit the class template form
Select the class template to edit
Fill Conditioning 30 Updated into the class name field
Save the class template changes
Verify the templates list shows the updated class template name

title: Navigate from dashboard to classes via sidebar
description: Verifies a signed-in user can navigate from the dashboard to Class Templates using the sidebar.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to navigate to the class templates section
Verify the class templates management view is displayed

title: Delete a coach from the coaches list
description: Verifies a staff user can delete a coach and the coach is removed from the coaches list within the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to coaches
Start adding a new coach
Fill Coach To Delete into the name field
Fill a valid coach contact value into the contact field
Submit the coach form
Select the coach record to delete
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted coach no longer appears in the coaches list

title: Delete a class template from the templates list
description: Verifies a staff user can delete a class template and it is removed from the templates list within the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to class templates
Start creating a new class template
Fill Template To Delete into the class name field
Select a valid duration value
Fill a short class description into the description field
Submit the class template form
Select the class template to delete
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted class template no longer appears in the templates list

title: View a ticket’s status from its details view
description: User can open a ticket from the list and see its current status in the ticket details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for tickets
Start creating a new ticket
Fill a unique subject into the ticket subject field
Fill details into the ticket description field
Submit the ticket
Open the newly created ticket from the list
Verify the ticket details view shows a status for the ticket

title: Delete an athlete and remove it from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete an athlete created in the session and the athlete is removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to navigate to the athletes section
Start adding a new athlete
Fill Test Athlete C into the athlete name field
Fill valid values into any other required athlete fields
Submit the new athlete form
Select the athlete named Test Athlete C to delete
Confirm the deletion
Verify the athlete no longer appears in the athletes list

title: Mark a notification as read from the notifications list
description: User can mark a notification as read and the list reflects the updated read state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for notifications
Mark a notification as read from the list
Verify the notification is shown as read in the notifications list

title: Inspect classes on different dates in the calendar
description: Verifies a coach can navigate between calendar dates and inspect scheduled classes on the selected date without UI instability.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to calendar
Navigate to a different date in the calendar
Open a scheduled class instance for the selected date
Verify class instance details are displayed
Verify the calendar still shows scheduled classes for the selected date

title: Save updated settings and see them reflected
description: User can modify a setting, save changes, and see the updated value reflected in the settings UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for settings
Modify a settings option to a different value
Save settings changes
Verify the updated setting value is reflected in the settings UI

title: View and inspect scheduled classes in week view
description: Verifies a coach can switch to week view and inspect scheduled classes across the displayed week.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to calendar
Switch the calendar to week view
Open a scheduled class instance within the displayed week
Verify class instance details are displayed

title: Open a notification to read details and return to the list
description: User can open a notification to view its details and return to the notifications list without losing the list context.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for notifications
Open a notification from the list
Return to the notifications list
Verify the notifications list is displayed

title: Creating a second ticket adds another row without removing the first
description: User can create multiple tickets and the list reflects multiple entries within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for tickets
Start creating a new ticket
Fill a unique subject into the ticket subject field
Fill details into the ticket description field
Submit the ticket
Start creating a new ticket
Fill a different unique subject into the ticket subject field
Fill different details into the ticket description field
Submit the ticket
Verify the tickets list shows multiple ticket entries

title: Settings changes persist in UI after navigating away and back within session
description: After saving settings, the user can navigate away and return to settings and still see the updated values within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for settings
Modify a settings option to a different value
Save settings changes
Click the navigation item for notifications
Click the navigation item for settings
Verify the updated setting value is still reflected in the settings UI

title: Read state remains consistent between notification detail and list views within session
description: After marking a notification as read, its read state remains consistent when opening its details and returning to the list within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for notifications
Mark a notification as read from the list
Open the same notification from the list
Return to the notifications list
Verify the notification is still shown as read in the notifications list

title: Class template form validation prevents invalid submission
description: Verifies the class template form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to class templates
Start creating a new class template
Submit the class template form without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify no new class template is added to the templates list

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: Verifies signing in with invalid credentials shows an error and does not grant access to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible
Verify the user is not on the dashboard

title: Coach form required-field validation prevents submission
description: Verifies the add-coach form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to coaches
Start adding a new coach
Submit the coach form without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify no new coach is added to the coaches list

title: Settings validation prevents saving invalid values
description: User cannot save settings with invalid or missing required values and sees validation feedback.

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

title: Ticket form shows validation errors for missing required fields

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for tickets
Start creating a new ticket
Submit the ticket without filling required fields
Verify ticket form validation errors are displayed

title: Cancel a coach deletion keeps the coach in the list
description: Verifies cancelling a coach deletion leaves the coach record unchanged in the coaches list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to coaches
Start adding a new coach
Fill Coach Keep into the name field
Fill a valid coach contact value into the contact field
Submit the coach form

Cancel the deletion

Submit the login form

title: Repeatedly marking a notification as read keeps UI stable
description: User can attempt to mark the same notification as read multiple times and the UI remains stable with the notification staying read.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for notifications
Mark a notification as read from the list
Mark the same notification as read again
Verify the notification remains shown as read in the notifications list
